title: Planeswalkers
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e4b5902a595a97c7dd94cab2da23e80a3fcf6e.png)

This mod adds some new things (original: Lololowka, Storytelling Team, Magic: the Gathering)

If you spawn with a spark (or if you've played long enough you can get one), then a lot of possibilities open up for you

# 
A spark can save your life when you need it most


![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1083760099509674115/1280912915674693712/2024-09-04_22-27-55.gif?ex=66d9ce9d&is=66d87d1d&hm=4ba1fc2d92dbc9b2f54f615fdf998f7b2dde6c861e14e4e25d010f2814f02dff&)

# 
You can travel through already visited worlds

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1083760099509674115/1280907246024396800/2024-09-04_22-05-38.gif?ex=66d9c955&is=66d877d5&hm=a606656880fd5e229c00d29acd89680721fb406baa3b3b2ab15c77813851b576&)

# 
???

![???](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4553ec08b883d7f925f52a437016c0d69a63f36.gif)

# 
Mod commads

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

/setStatBool (player) "spark" (true/false) give or take away a spark

/setStatInt (player) "stamina" (0-100) change your spark stamina

/getStatBool (player) "spark" information about the presence of a spark

/getStatInt (player) "stamina" information about spark stamina

</details>
